message:
Running command: # OK, let's just check current status and give it more time
sleep 600
ps -p 625425 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ANTENNA CHECK DONE"
cat /proc/625425/stat 2>/dev/null | awk '{print "CPU time (secs):", $14/100}'
cat /proc/625425/io 2>/dev/null | grep "^rchar"
ls /proc/625425/fd/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/openroad-checkantennas-1.log 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || echo "log empty"
